Nd2|Tarrasch]] → [[Chess Opening Theory/1. e4/1...e6/2. d4/2...d5/3. Nd2/3...Nf6|Closed Tarrasch]] → [[../|5...c5]] }} == 6. c3 == White reinforces their pawn chain. [[/6...Nc6|'''6...Nc6''']] increases the pressure on d4, and Black can also add an attacker with ...Qb6. White can choose to defend it with 7. Ne2, meeting 7...Qb6 with 8. Nf3, or gambit it with 7. Ngf3. '''6...b6''', the '''Botvinnik variation''', prepares to trade off Black's bad bishop for White's good one. ==Theory table== {{Chess Opening Theory/Table}} 1.e4 e6 2.d4 d5 3.Nd2 Nf6 4.e5 Nfd7 5.Bd3 c5 6.c3
6
